step_description: Redo generation rate and log file sync waits
rows: log file sync avg wait ms
narrative_hint: Redo activity is within normal bounds — log file sync average wait is only 2.4ms and redo generation at 180KB/sec is moderate. This rules out redo-related causes for the current slowness. Claude should note this is normal and the root cause is elsewhere (consistent with the I/O wait pattern seen in the entry step).
